title: narcissus poeticus var. patellaris
intro: Narcissus poeticus var. patellaris, commonly known as the Pheasant's Eye or Patellaris Narcissus, is a perennial bulbous plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. It is a rare and exotic variety of the Narcissus poeticus, known for its unique and delicate appearance. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Narcissus poeticus var. patellaris include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and support the immune system, and it can be prepared as an herbal tea or tincture.
